# Fast

> Official documentation for the Fast ecosystem — a production-grade FastAPI-oriented framework, monorepo packages, and tutorials.

## Site

- Documentation home: `/?page=docs`
- Blog: `/?page=blog`
- Architecture overview: `/?page=architecture`
- Community & OSS: `/?page=community`

## Note

This file helps AI assistants and tools discover high-level entry points. For authoritative technical detail, follow links in the documentation UI.
